result: I would make empathy as automatic and overwhelming as breathing—so that every person feels the inner reality of every other person as vividly as their own. Not as a vague sentiment, but as direct, undeniable sensation. Hatred, cruelty, exploitation, indifference would collapse not because they're forbidden, but because they'd become literally unthinkable when you instantly experience the other's joy or suffering as your own. It's a single shift that rewires everything else: politics, economics, family, war.
